name: sd-perturbed-attention
description: Perturbed-Attention Guidance (PAG), Smoothed Energy Guidance (SEG), Sliding Window Guidance (SWG), PLADIS, Normalized Attention Guidance (NAG), Token Perturbation Guidance (TPG), Frequency-Decoupled Guidance (FDG), Momentum Guidance (MG), Sliding Mode Control CFG (SMC-CFG), mostly for ComfyUI.
